notes: Public JSON endpoint discovered via DevTools. Request uses application/x-www-form-urlencoded form data. f001d_0102 appears to be report period / section date. f002d_0102 and f006d_0102 appear to be scheduled/current disclosure dates. f003d_0102/f004d_0102/f005d_0102 appear to be change-date related fields; exact semantics need confirmation. totalRows in observed response was 5493. Do not treat field semantics as fully verified.; dry-run: 未发起请求

Public JSON endpoint discovered via DevTools. detailList returns company-level margin trading records. Observed total was 4374 records. Request currently uses POST with empty body and no query params. Field semantics F001N/F002N/F003N/F004N/F006N/F007N/F008N/F009N need confirmation. F010V/F011V/F012V appear to be market / board / stock type fields. market endpoint also exists at https://www.cninfo.com.cn/data20/marginTrading/market?tdate=2026-07-02, but it is market-level summary and is not used as the main company-level source in this task. Do not treat field semantics as fully verified.; dry-run: 未发起请求

source_name: 公开信息 / 异常交易
notes: Public JSON endpoint discovered via DevTools. Referrer page url=data/public-information indicates public information / abnormal trading page. Request uses POST with query parameters and empty body. marketList returns company-level abnormal trading / public information records. detail contains nested broker branch buy/sell fields. Observed total was 151 and totalPage was 6 for 2026-07-03. Field semantics and nested detail structure need confirmation. Do not treat field semantics as fully verified.; dry-run: 未发起请求

Public JSON endpoint discovered via DevTools. Endpoint path is /shareholeder/detail; spelling is shareholeder in observed request. Referrer page is url=data/person-stock-data-tables, tab 股东增减持. shareholder_change supports two modes: type=inc: share increase detail (observed with tdate=2026-07-03, total=3). type=desc: share decrease detail (observed HTTP 200, total=16, count=16; tdate may be null). inc and desc share the same raw field structure (8 fields). Do not use type=dec; observed parameter is type=desc. Request uses POST with query parameters and empty body. data.records returns company-level shareholder change records. Field semantics confirmed via UI for both inc and desc modes. Do not treat field semantics as fully verified. Do not write verified.; dry-run: 未发起请求

Public JSON endpoint discovered via DevTools. Referrer page is url=data/person-stock-data-tables, tab 高管持股. Request uses POST with query parameters timeMark=oneMonth and varyType=b. data.records returns company-level executive shareholding change records. Observed total was 842.
